target: Smart Lock System for Lesson Progression
summary: ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests verifying lock-status endpoint, admin bypass, sequential lesson locking, and cross-unit locking. Frontend: Smart Lock UI working correctly with lock icons, toast messages on locked lesson click, and 'Lesson Locked' page with Go Back button for direct URL access. Fixed minor bug: 'Complete Unit undefined first' text now shows correct unit number.

issues: FIXED: 'Complete Unit undefined first' text was showing instead of correct unit number. Fixed by using unit_number || number fallback.

test_third_lesson_locked - PASSED

rule_1_first_lesson_unlocked.description: First lesson of first unit always unlocked

rule_2_sequential_within_unit.description: Each lesson unlocked only if previous lesson completed

rule_3_cross_unit_dependency.description: First lesson of unit N unlocked only if ALL lessons in unit N-1 completed
rule_3_cross_unit_dependency.example: Unit 2 locked until all 4 lessons in Unit 1 completed

tests: Stage 1 page loads with units and lessons
Lock icons visible on locked lessons
First lesson clickable and navigates to lesson page
Locked lesson click shows toast message
Direct URL to locked lesson shows 'Lesson Locked' page
Go Back button visible on locked lesson page
Admin user can access locked lessons

critical_code_review_comments: Backend _is_lesson_unlocked function in unified_learning_routes.py correctly implements sequential lock logic
Frontend UnifiedStagePage.js correctly calculates isUnitUnlocked and isLessonUnlocked
Toast notification correctly shown via sonner library on locked lesson click
UnifiedLessonPage.js correctly checks lock status via API and displays 'Lesson Locked' screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 verified Smart Lock system for lesson progression. Backend lock-status API working correctly. Frontend shows lock icons, toast on locked click, and 'Lesson Locked' page for direct URL access. Admin emails bypass all locks. Fixed minor issue with 'Complete Unit undefined first' text.

mocked_api.note: All smart lock functionality uses real MongoDB queries to check user progress

fix_applied.reason: prevUnit.number was null for most units, needed to use unit_number as fallback
